common.tagline: Your local commerce platform for Lebanon

landing.heroTitle: Every store, product, and service in Lebanon — in one place
landing.heroSubtitle: Restaurants, shops, services, clinics, real estate and cars. Launch your online store or business page in minutes.

modular.title: Modular by design
modular.body: Each business type has its own modules — food, retail, services, healthcare, real estate, and automotive.

easy.title: Effortless
easy.body: A simple dashboard built for business owners, no technical experience required.

local.title: 100% local
local.body: Search by area and category, then order or book directly from your favorite store.
